name: Mike Pompeo
title: Former Secretary of State & CIA Director
bio: American politician, diplomat, and businessman who served as the 70th Secretary of State and Director of the CIA. West Point graduate.
faith: An evangelical Presbyterian who has been open about how his Christian faith informs his worldview and policy positions. He has spoken at faith-based events about the role of Christianity in public service.

sources.title: Mike Pompeo — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the former Secretary of State

tagline: Served as Secretary of State guided by a biblical worldview
